ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the match event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., ATP World Tour) */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., HARD, CLAY) */,
  "num_of_sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets played */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament (e.g., R32, R16) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match is played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "career_high_rank" INTEGER /* Highest ranking achieved by the player */,
  "career_winnings" TEXT /* Total career winnings of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "playerA_id" INTEGER /* ID of player A */,
  "playerB_id" INTEGER /* ID of player B */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "set_scores" TEXT /* Detailed set scores */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the match in minutes */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total number of points played in the match */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_playerA_id FOREIGN KEY ("playerA_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_playerB_id FOREIGN KEY ("playerB_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the match for the player in minutes */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces served by the player */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults made by the player */,
  "first_serve_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits on first serves */,
  "first_serve_total" INTEGER /* Total number of first serves attempted */,
  "first_serve_won" INTEGER /* Number of first serve points won */,
  "second_serve_won" INTEGER /* Number of second serve points won */,
  "return_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of return points won */,
  "return_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of return points played */,
  "break_points_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of break points faced by the player */,
  "break_points_converted" INTEGER /* Number of break points converted by the player */,
  "net_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of net points won */,
  "net_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of net points played */,
  "unforced_errors" INTEGER /* Number of unforced errors made by the player */,
  "forced_errors" INTEGER /* Number of forced errors made by the player */,
  "winning_shots" INTEGER /* Number of winning shots made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_statistics" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the player */,
  "break_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of break points faced */,
  "service_games" INTEGER /* Total service games played */,
  "service_points_won" INTEGER /* Total points won on service */,
  "service_points_total" INTEGER /* Total service points played */,
  "first_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of first serves in */,
  "second_serve_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of second serves in */,
  "break_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of break points won */,
  "break_points_lost" INTEGER /* Number of break points lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, coach, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
